{{Quote|Newcomer Jomo (Yoberra) was victorious in the octoped category ''[…]''<nowiki />|A HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|sports/13418_1.html|New Galaxy's Fastest Hexaped}}</ref>}}
'''Yoberra''' was a celestial body<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Yoberra system/Legends|Yoberra system]], a part of the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Limb/Legends|octopedal]] being [[Jomo]] [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from Yoberra, a fact that was noted in the [[22 BBY/Legends|13:4:18]] issue of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News']] [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]], in an article mentioning Jomo's triumph in the "[[Mobquet Presents: Fastest Land Beings]]" racing event.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yoberra was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 52|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #52]], an issue of the representation of the [[in-universe]] HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> that was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[April 18]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN52 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6493893|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-04-18|time=6:27 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072939/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-11#post-6493893}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Yoberra [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Yoberra itself, in grid square M-20.<ref name="TEA" />
